title: Mock Test Post
subtitle: A test blog post demonstrating all available content components

mainContent.content: Welcome to this test blog! This demonstrates all content component types supported by the current blog system.

The **ParaBlock component** now supports Markdown syntax! You can use:

- **Bold text**
- *Italic text*
- `Inline code`
- [Links](https://github.com)

You can also use lists:

1. Ordered list item
2. Another item

mainContent.text: This is a QuoteBlock component for highlighting important quotes or notes.

mainContent.content: **LinkJumper component** - For jumping to external links:
**InArticleImage component** - Displays image carousel with auto-switching (5s interval), pauses on hover.
As shown above, the image component automatically cycles through multiple images. Each image has its own caption.

You can also use different aspect ratios:

- 16/9 (widescreen, default)
- 4/3 (traditional display)
- 1/1 (square)
- 9/16 (portrait)
Writing blog content is simple - just add objects to the mainContent array in the JSON file. Each object has a type property specifying which component to use.

1. **paragraph** - Paragraph component with Markdown support
2. **heading** - Heading component (H1-H5)
3. **quote** - Quote block component
4. **link** - External link component
5. **imageBed** - Image carousel component

This is a flexible and powerful content system. You can create rich blog content by combining different components. All components follow consistent design principles to ensure visual unity across the website.

To add new component types:
1. Create new component in components/mainPage/component/
2. Add corresponding case in contentRenderer.js
3. Use the new type in JSON
